BerriQ

Blueberry Lemon Zest Protein Crunch Bar

Wild blueberries and bright lemon zest on a base of puffed quinoa crunch. Built for the label-reader who refuses to compromise — on ingredients or on taste.

Plant-Based Nut-Free Gluten-Free No Artificial Dyes
Order Now →
🫐
Wild Blueberry + Lemon Zest

The fastest-rising flavor combo in functional snacks. Bright, refreshing, and completely unclaimed at the premium clean-label tier.

✨
Puffed Quinoa Crunch

A satisfying crunch texture no other clean-label bar offers. Quinoa adds complete protein and a premium ingredient story.

💪
Dual Protein Blend

Pea + brown rice protein hits 16g per bar with none of the chalky taste — the #1 complaint about plant protein bars.

🍬
Zero Added Sugar

Naturally sweetened by Medjool dates and monk fruit. Zero added sugar on the label that actually means something.

🚫
100% Nut-Free

Sunflower seed butter instead of nuts — making BerriQ safe for schools, offices, and allergy-aware families.

🌱
Completely Plant-Based

No dairy, no eggs, no animal products. Every ingredient is plant-derived and ethically sourced by Nouri Co.

What's Inside

Every ingredient
earns its place.

We chose each ingredient for a specific reason. Nothing is filler. Nothing is there to hide anything.

  • Puffed Quinoa
    Complete protein source + the crunch that makes BerriQ unmistakable on first bite.
  • Pea + Brown Rice Protein
    Dual blend delivers 16g without the chalky aftertaste of single-source plant proteins.
  • Wild Blueberries
    Antioxidant-rich and naturally sweet. Real dried fruit, not flavoring.
  • Medjool Dates
    Natural binder and sweetener. Zero added sugar — just the sugar nature put there.
  • Sunflower Seed Butter
    Nut-free binder with healthy fats. Safe for schools. Safe for everyone.
  • Fresh Lemon Zest
    The bright citrus note that makes this bar impossible to confuse with anything else on shelf.

"Real Ingredients.
Real Protein. Real Crunch."

What People Are Saying

Early tasters love it.

★★★★★

"Finally a protein bar that doesn't taste like a compromise. The blueberry lemon flavor is genuinely refreshing — nothing like the chocolate-everything bars that dominate the category."

SL
Sarah L.
Fitness Coach · Austin, TX
★★★★★

"I have a tree nut allergy and finding a protein bar that's safe AND has good macros has been impossible. BerriQ solved that problem. The crunch from the quinoa is addictive."

MK
Marcus K.
CrossFit athlete · Portland, OR
★★★★★

"I bought a box for me and my daughter uses them as a school snack because they're nut-free. The fact that one product works for both of us — that's rare. Already on my third order."
